0.q: E. coli KNabc (pUC19–HaNhaD) and E. coli KNabc (pUC19–HaMrpD) exhibited enhanced Na+ tolerance in the presence of 100–500 mM NaCl, indicating that these two antiporters are mainly responsible for Na+/H+ exchange.
